positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u15,axiom,
    international_student(mike)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    cpt != opt).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    has_visa(X0,j1) | has_visa(X0,f1) | ~international_student(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    f1 != j1).

cnf(u18,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_visa(mike,f1)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define wants_to_work(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define needs_to_apply(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u15,axiom,
    f1 != j1).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    cpt != opt).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define wants_to_work(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define international_student(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define has_visa(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define needs_to_apply(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
